violations.text: The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
The kitchen is lacking a hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
The hand sink in the bar area is lacking a splash guard to prevent potential contamination to the ice next to it. Splash guard to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
